description_long: This object is a gold-colored medal suspended from a light blue, slightly frayed ribbon. The medal features a prominent crown at the top, with intricate detailing, and a round medallion below that appears to have an embossed emblem or coat of arms on the front. The reverse side of the medallion displays engraved text, likely denoting the award or honor. The ribbon is folded and stitched, showing signs of age and wear, with a pin or clasp mechanism likely hidden behind for attachment. The overall design is ornate, with the crown and medallion both exhibiting fine decorative elements, suggesting a ceremonial or official purpose.
description: A gold medal with a detailed crown and round medallion, suspended from a light blue, worn ribbon. The front features an embossed emblem, while the back has engraved text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold crown, round medallion with an embossed emblem, and the light blue ribbon.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the medal and ribbon, with the crown and medallion's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the medallion with engraved text and the reverse side of the ribbon.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the medallion and the layered construction of the ribbon.
